_about: Mock AI response for /harness-init and /harness-adopt AI-native customization (v0.16.0). Load with HARNESS_AI_NATIVE_MOCK=<path-to-this-file>. The skill substitutes this file's content for the live AI completion, then runs the four invariants validator and writes .harness/rules/50-<slug>.md plus the partition_agents drafts. Shipped under templates/common/scripts/ so users can also dry-run AI-native locally after init.
rule_md:
# 50 ŌĆö Project-specific rules (test-project)

> Generated 2026-05-19 by AI customization step (mock fixture). Provenance via `<!-- source: ... -->` comments.

## When to read

<!-- source: user-q2 -->
- When touching code in this project.
- When dispatching the developer agent (or a `dev-*` partition) on a task that
  affects the build / test / verify pipeline.

## Build / test / verify

<!-- source: package.json -->
- Build:   `npm run build`
- Test:    `npm test`
- Lint / typecheck: `npm run lint && npm run typecheck`
- Total verify gate: `scripts/verify_all` (PowerShell or Bash) must PASS before declaring any task done.

## Project structure

<!-- source: top-level-glob -->
- `apps/payments/` ŌĆö payments service (REST API + worker)
- `apps/ingest/` ŌĆö streaming ingest service
- `packages/shared/` ŌĆö shared TypeScript types and utilities
- `migrations/` ŌĆö SQL migrations (numeric prefix = order)
- `scripts/` ŌĆö verify_all, harness-sync, guard-rm, install-hooks, archive-task

## Stack-specific conventions

<!-- source: user-q2 -->
- TypeScript strict mode everywhere; no `any` without an inline `// reason: ...` comment.
- Prefer pure functions in `packages/shared/`; side effects live behind the
  service boundary (`apps/<service>/src/handlers/`).
- Database access goes through a single repository module per service; no raw
  SQL outside `apps/<service>/src/db/`.

<!-- source: package.json -->
- Workspace package layout follows `pnpm` workspace conventions (the
  `workspaces` field in `package.json` lists `apps/*` and `packages/*`).

## Partitioning

<!-- source: top-level-glob -->
- Two partition developers proposed (see `.harness/agents/dev-payments.md` and
  `.harness/agents/dev-ingest.md`): one per top-level service directory.
- Tasks crossing both partitions go through PM Orchestrator + Solution Architect
  for explicit cross-partition assignment.
- The generic `developer.md` stays as fallback for tasks that touch only
  `packages/shared/`, `migrations/`, or top-level configs.

## Stack-specific verify_all checks

<!-- source: package.json -->
- Optional: add a `verify_all` step that runs `pnpm -r typecheck` to catch
  cross-workspace type drift early. Leave commented until the workspace has a
  baseline that PASSes.

partition_agents.name: dev-payments
partition_agents.body:
---
name: dev-payments
description: Partition developer for the payments service. Owns paths under apps/payments/ and migrations matching V*__payments_*.sql. Reports to PM Orchestrator.
tools: Read, Write, Edit, Glob, Grep, Bash, PowerShell, TodoWrite
---

# dev-payments

Owned paths:
- `apps/payments/**`
- `migrations/V*__payments_*.sql`

## When to dispatch
- Tasks touching files under the owned-path globs above.
- Tasks where the requirement / design explicitly assigns the `payments` partition.

## Boundaries
- Never edit files under `apps/ingest/` or `packages/shared/` without an
  Architect-issued cross-partition dispatch. Surface those cases back to PM.
- Database migrations affecting tables outside the `payments_*` namespace require
  coordination with the developer who owns those tables.

## Hand-off
When complete, return control to PM Orchestrator with a one-paragraph summary
of what changed and what verify_all reported.

partition_agents.name: dev-ingest
partition_agents.body:
---
name: dev-ingest
description: Partition developer for the streaming ingest service. Owns paths under apps/ingest/ and migrations matching V*__ingest_*.sql. Reports to PM Orchestrator.
tools: Read, Write, Edit, Glob, Grep, Bash, PowerShell, TodoWrite
---

# dev-ingest

Owned paths:
- `apps/ingest/**`
- `migrations/V*__ingest_*.sql`

## When to dispatch
- Tasks touching files under the owned-path globs above.
- Tasks where the requirement / design explicitly assigns the `ingest` partition.

## Boundaries
- Never edit files under `apps/payments/` or `packages/shared/` without an
  Architect-issued cross-partition dispatch.
- Schema changes that affect downstream `payments` consumers require explicit
  cross-partition coordination via PM Orchestrator.

## Hand-off
Return control to PM Orchestrator with a summary on completion.
